title: oreomunnea guatemalensis
intro: Oreomunnea guatemalensis, also known as the Guatemalan oreomunnea, is a species of evergreen tree in the family Cephalotaceae, native to the cloud forests of Guatemala. The medicinal properties of Oreomunnea guatemalensis include its potential anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even have a potential role in cancer treatment due to its anticancer properties. Oreomunnea guatemalensis is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are traditionally used to treat various health conditions in traditional medicine.
